mapper.select: SELECT id, emp_no AS emp_no, name , dept_id AS deptId, pos_id AS posId FROM TB_USER WHERE dept_id = #{deptId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user( name, password, email, dept_id, pos_id, pw_update_dt, update_dt )VALUES ( #{name}, #{password}, #{email}, #{deptId}, #{posId}, #{pwUpdateAt}, #{updateAt} )
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT (*) FROM tb_user WHERE email = #{email}
SELECT u.id, u.emp_no, u.password, u.name, a.id AS auth_id, a.auth_name, a.granted_dt FROM tb_user u LEFT JOIN tb_user_auth a ON u.id = a.user_id where u.emp_no = #{empNo}
SELECT u.emp_no, u.name, u.email, d.name AS deptName, p.name AS posName FROM tb_user u INNER JOIN tb_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id INNER JOIN tb_position p ON u.pos_id = p.id WHERE u.emp_no = #{empNo}

SELECT u.id, u.emp_no AS empNo, u.name, u.email, u.dept_id AS deptId, u.pos_id AS posId, u.noti_f AS noti_f, d.name AS deptName, p.name AS posName FROM tb_user u INNER JOIN tb_dept d ON u.dept_id = d.id INNER JOIN tb_position p ON u.pos_id = p.id WHERE u.emp_no = #{empNo}
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user set password = #{password} where emp_no = #{empNo}
